title: Neutradol Shake It Fresh Carpet Deodoriser, Odour Neutraliser for Carpets & Rugs, Pink & Super Scent, Multipack of 2 x 350g
features: Tackles Pet, Smoke & Cooking Odours: Scientifically formulated to break down and neutralise odours at their source, including stubborn smells from pets, food, and tobacco, leaving your carpets genuinely fresh.
Lasting Freshness After Vacuuming: The fresh pink fragrance lingers long after vacuuming, keeping your rooms smelling clean and inviting day after day.
Simple Shake and Vacuum Formula: Just sprinkle lightly over carpets or rugs, let it sit for a few minutes, and vacuum as usual. Instant freshness in three easy steps.
Gentle and Effective Formula: With over 50 active ingredients, it breaks down even the toughest smells for a truly clean, fresh environment.
Versatile Use: Ideal for refreshing carpets, area rugs, pet beds, upholstery, anywhere unwanted odours tend to linger.
